$comment: Curated official U.S. government UAP/UFO document releases. Used by `npm run ingest`. Government sites (dni.gov, media.defense.gov) sometimes block non-browser clients — if a download fails, open the URL in a browser, save the PDF into a folder, and run `npm run ingest -- --dir <folder>` instead. Landing pages for finding new releases: https://www.aaro.mil/Reports/ , https://www.dni.gov/index.php/newsroom/reports-publications , https://www.archives.gov/research/topics/uaps , https://www.cia.gov/readingroom/collection/ufos , https://vault.fbi.gov/UFO

sources.name: ODNI-Preliminary-Assessment-UAP-2021.pdf
sources.title: ODNI — Preliminary Assessment: Unidentified Aerial Phenomena (June 2021)
